issues: Worker workspace was missing the latest runbook copy before reseed.

uncertainty.reason: Bindings look correct, but the seeded workspace was not fully current before recovery.

safeAction: Route the result to a human operator before claiming the runtime is fully ready.

escalation.reason: Runtime recovery changed a seeded workspace and still needs operator-visible verification.
escalation.safeAction: Run worker-status after restart and review the routing snapshot.
